what: Mechanism-gated hardening plan; only changes with a mechanism to move/interpret the reported metric are built
rationale: Overlay injects prediction as diagonal rescale (verified from source run_eval_local.py) => metric is mean-only; model/training-side fixes cannot move it

Math standard; application to perturbation-prediction benchmarks is novel. Council: restate as exact-deterministic + asymptotic-under-noise; verify edge-flips empirically, do NOT claim 'exactly invariant'

Council redesign: decisive control is mean-matched null (real-doubles-means-through-overlay, cond B) vs additive-means-through-overlay (cond C). B>C => marginal-mean non-additivity (honest, within Wall-1). B~=C => advantage was cell-path joint structure (surprising, needs investigation)
Lead methodology-first; Wall-1 proven (corrected form), Wall-2 empirical (not a theorem)
Primary: existing 5-seed empirical DISCARD. Wall-1 is the scoped mechanistic explanation (overlay eval is mean-only), NOT a claim no eval could reward it
Collapses to per-gene mean at overlay; only bypass (instrument-fix on real cells) already null (Wall-2). Revivable only with a joint-structure-reading eval that does not exist
Confirmation of a negative; needs R + free CPU; off critical path
